content.swara: Eduppu at ½ beat (i.e. 2 aksharas).The laya procee ds as 2-6-4-4 | 6-2-4-4 || The 6s amidst the 4s add  variety and odd
content.sahitya: Counts In The Progression: Each Of The 6S Is Broken  Into Two 3S (Dn-dp And Rg-m, ). The Overall Idea I S To Mix 2-6S With 4-4 To Fill Up ||
